title: An Act to Strengthen the Regulatory Functions of the Philippine Overseas Employment Administration (POEA), Amending Republic Act No. 8042
content:
This Act amends Section 23, paragraph (b.1) of Republic Act No. 8042 (Migrant Workers and Overseas Filipinos Act of 1995) to strengthen the regulatory functions of the POEA. It mandates the POEA to regulate private sector participation in recruitment and overseas placement of workers through licensing and registration, promote and monitor overseas employment considering worker welfare and domestic manpower needs, inform migrant workers of their rights as workers and human beings, and provide mechanisms to redress rights violations. It restricts deployment of Filipino workers to countries with bilateral labor agreements that guarantee protection of workers' rights and compliance with international standards.

Sections 29 and 30 of RA 8042 are repealed. All laws, orders, issuances, rules, or regulations inconsistent with this Act are repealed, amended, or modified accordingly. The Act takes effect 15 days after publication in newspapers of general circulation.
